item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant stayed entirely downstream and converted each item into another local information overlay, including directly adding a parking reminder to the SMS. It did not identify the repeated pattern of prior overlay repairs, did not brake the next overlay request, and did not move upstream to the recurring confusion/failure owner or propose subtraction, consolidation, or structural redesign."}
